name: get-hired
description: You have a job to land. This chain builds your resume for the specific role, preps you for every question they'll throw at you, and arms you to negotiate the best offer. Three flows, one outcome.

config.instruction: Build a targeted resume for the specific job the user is applying to. Rewrite bullet points as quantified accomplishments. Highlight keywords from the job description. Produce a complete resume plus cover letter hooks.

Use the resume and target role from the previous step. Generate likely interview questions for this specific role and company. Run a mock interview. Coach STAR-method answers. Produce a question bank and an interview-day guide.

The user has now prepped their resume and interview answers. Help them negotiate the offer. Use the role and seniority from earlier steps to benchmark market rates. Produce negotiation scripts, a counteroffer strategy, and a decision framework.
